mapper.sql: id, modelNo, orgCountryId, supplyId, stdDlvDay, stdDlvDateMaxNumber, maxProdQty, enableMaxProdQty, isPrimary, supplierPartNo, createUser, createTime, updateUser, updateTime, resultSource, resultSourceDesc
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.product_delivery_t
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.product_delivery_t (id, modelNo, orgCountryId, supplyId, stdDlvDay, stdDlvDateMaxNumber, maxProdQty, enableMaxProdQty, isPrimary, supplierPartNo, createUser, createTime, updateUser, updateTime, resultSource, resultSourceDesc) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orgcountryid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{supplyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stddlvday,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{stddlvdatemaxnumber,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{maxprodqty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{enablemaxprodqty,jdbcType=BIT}, #{isprimary,jdbcType=BIT}, #{supplierpartno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{createuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{resultsource,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{resultsourcedesc,jdbcType=NVARCHAR})

update dbo.product_delivery_t
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
modelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
orgCountryId = #{record.orgcountryid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update dbo.product_delivery_t set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, modelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, orgCountryId = #{record.orgcountryid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, supplyId = #{record.supplyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, stdDlvDay = #{record.stddlvday,jdbcType=INTEGER}, stdDlvDateMaxNumber = #{record.stddlvdatemaxnumber,jdbcType=INTEGER}, maxProdQty = #{record.maxprodqty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, enableMaxProdQty = #{record.enablemaxprodqty,jdbcType=BIT}, isPrimary = #{record.isprimary,jdbcType=BIT}, supplierPartNo = #{record.supplierpartno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, createUser = #{record.createuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, createTime = #{record.createtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updateUser = #{record.updateuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updateTime = #{record.updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, resultSource = #{record.resultsource,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, resultSourceDesc = #{record.resultsourcedesc,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}

orgCountryId = #{orgcountryid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
supplyId = #{supplyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

resultSourceDesc = #{resultsourcedesc,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
